since_last: 39% of 100 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.53%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 39% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.95% · BTC +0.13% · Gold +0.78% · Nasdaq100 -1.30%. 39% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.53%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.53%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -2.51%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -12.90%
cards.body: Leaders: LEU +5.63%, SKHY +4.97%, CSCO +2.64%, DELL +2.58%, ZS +2.54%. Laggards: ISRG -12.90%, PUBM -5.87%, AMAT -5.27%, BIDU -4.76%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.67% at $124.99
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.67% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
